content_rotation.text:
PSA: The new electricity rate hikes just hit NSW. Did anyone else's power bill just jump? 📈

I have a link to the Gov site to check rebates, and I can show you how to read your bill to see if you're overpaying. 

Comment 'INFO' below and I'll send it over.

ALERT 🚨: A lot of people in this group don't realize the government is currently handing out solar rebates. It literally pays for a huge chunk of the system. 

Comment 'REBATE' below and I'll send you the link to check your address eligibility.

Stop paying the 'Lazy Tax' on your electricity! 🛑

I just found out my neighbor was paying 30% more than me just because they hadn't switched plans in 2 years. 

If you want to know which companies have the lowest rates this month, comment 'PLAN' and I'll send you the list.
